situational_context: Active rebuild phase, week 3 post-bootstrap. Return-to-running protocol in progress (2 runs completed: Run #1 May 3 at HR 135, Run #2 May 9 at HR 144). Training mix: ebike commuting on sur-site days (load 6-14/ride), gravel for structured load (load 17-57), running re-introduction (load 7-15). Chronic load climbing slowly (17.8->22.7, 1.4% of 2023 peak). ACWR 0.67 — below optimal band, safe to ramp. Weight trending down well: 106.9->104.1 kg in 3.5 weeks (-2.8 kg), ahead of -1.2 kg/month target. RHR improved 53->49. Run #2 showed higher cardiac cost than Run #1 (HR avg 144 vs 135 at similar pace) — attributed to residual fatigue from prior-day gravel. Readiness consistently high. Infant cohabitant (Leonie, 16 months) present; sleep adequate at 7.7h avg.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Endurance velo Z2 ou Gravel Z2
Run #3 conditionnel OU Endurance velo Z2

recommendations.text: Continue return-to-running protocol: Run #3 on May 15 conditional on zero localized pain from Run #2. Target HR avg <=145 bpm at 8:30-9:00/km pace. If HR rises above 150, shorten to 15 min max.
recommendations.measurable: Run #3 completed with HR avg <=145 bpm OR correctly deferred to bike if pain present

recommendations.text: Address macro imbalance: reduce fat intake toward 80g target, increase protein toward 150g. Current 7d avg: fat 137g (+71% over target), protein 122g (-19% under target). Fat is crowding out carb budget for cycling performance.
Execute both weekend sessions (Sat 16 + Sun 17) to rebuild training consistency and push ACWR toward 0.8. Consistent frequency matters more than individual session quality at this rebuild stage.
recommendations.measurable: >=5 dedicated training sessions completed May 10-17 (excluding commutes)

markers_to_watch.threshold: Run #3 HR avg should be <=145 bpm at 8:30-9:00/km. If >150 flag cardiovascular regression
markers_to_watch.reason: Run #2 showed +9 bpm avg HR vs Run #1 at similar pace. Need Run #3 to confirm whether gravel-fatigue artifact or trend.
Below optimal band (0.8-1.3). Consistent sessions this week should bring it up.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Rate of loss should be <=1 kg/week to protect tendon adaptation
markers_to_watch.reason: Lost 2.8 kg in 3.5 weeks (~0.8 kg/wk) — within safe range but monitor per return-to-running protocol.
